title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Accepting Bitcoin for Ebook Sales — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You've poured your heart and soul into writing an ebook, but PayPal and Stripe won't let you sell it to your audience in Kenya. You've tried every workaround, but the payment gateways always shut you down. You're not alone. Many creators face the same hurdle. But what if you could bypass the traditional payment processors and sell your ebook directly to your fans? What if you could get paid instantly, without any intermediaries? The good news is that you can. With the right tools, you can unlock the power of Bitcoin and accept payments from anywhere in the world, without relying on PayPal or Stripe. In this guide, we'll show you how to do just that.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The traditional payment processors have strict restrictions and hoops to jump through, which is why they often block creators from certain countries. But Bitcoin operates on a decentralized network, allowing for peer-to-peer transactions without the need for intermediaries. This means you can sell your ebook directly to your fans, without relying on a third-party payment processor. With the Web3 Wallet Connect, you can integrate Bitcoin payments into your website, giving you the freedom to sell your ebook without any restrictions. This method works when everything else fails because it bypasses the traditional payment processing system altogether.
What You Need Before You Start

To accept Bitcoin payments for your ebook, you'll need a few key tools. First, you'll need a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies and doesn't require any KYC or buyer account setup. Next, you'll need a delivery system that can automate the process of sending your ebook to customers after payment. This is where the Core Shop Engine comes in, which provides a backend system for automated delivery and payment verification. Finally, you'll need a frontend system to integrate with your website, which is where the Web3 Wallet Connect comes in. With these tools in place, you'll be ready to start accepting Bitcoin payments for your ebook.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment and delivery pipeline involves integrating the Core Shop Engine with your website and the Web3 Wallet Connect. This will allow you to automate the process of sending your ebook to customers after payment. You'll need to set up a payment gateway with NOWPayments and configure the Core Shop Engine to work with it. Once this is in place, you can configure the Web3 Wallet Connect to display a Bitcoin payment button on your website. This will allow customers to pay for your ebook using Bitcoin, and the Core Shop Engine will automate the process of sending the ebook after payment.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

With your payment and delivery pipeline in place, it's time to go live and make your first sale. This involves configuring your website to display the Bitcoin payment button and testing it with a small group of customers. Once you've verified that the payment process is working correctly, you can open up your website to the public and start selling your ebook. Be sure to communicate with your customers about the payment process and let them know that they'll receive their ebook automatically after payment. With the right tools and setup, you'll be able to make your first sale and start generating revenue from your ebook.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is up and running, it's time to think about scaling. This involves optimizing your website and the Core Shop Engine to handle a large volume of payments and ebook deliveries. You may need to upgrade your hosting and setup additional infrastructure to support the increased traffic. Additionally, you'll want to continually monitor the system to ensure that it's running smoothly and make adjustments as needed. With the right setup and optimization, you'll be able to scale your ebook sales and generate significant revenue from your digital product.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

What if I don't have any experience with Bitcoin or cryptocurrency payments? Don't worry, the Web3 Wallet Connect is designed to be easy to use and integrates seamlessly with your website. You can start accepting Bitcoin payments for your ebook right away, even if you don't have any prior experience with cryptocurrency payments. The most important thing is to follow the setup instructions carefully and test the payment process thoroughly before going live.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

Now that you've learned how to accept Bitcoin payments for your ebook, you may be wondering how to scale your sales and reach a wider audience. Consider partnering with influencers or other digital creators to promote your ebook to their followers. You can also use social media and email marketing to reach potential customers and drive traffic to your website. By diversifying your marketing efforts and promoting your ebook to a wider audience, you can increase your sales and generate significant revenue from your digital product.
Your Action Checklist

Before you start accepting Bitcoin payments for your ebook, be sure to: 1. Set up a payment gateway with NOWPayments 2. Configure the Core Shop Engine to work with the payment gateway 3. Integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect with your website 4. Test the payment process thoroughly before going live 5. Communicate with your customers about the payment process 6. Monitor the system to ensure it's running smoothly and make adjustments as needed 7. Optimize your website and the Core Shop Engine to handle a large volume of payments and ebook deliveries 8. Continually update and improve the system to ensure it's running efficiently.
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
